name: Espansr Quick Help
description: Quick reference for espansr CLI commands.
content:
espansr CLI commands:
  list       — show templates with triggers
  sync       — sync to Espanso
  status     — show config paths
  setup      — run post-install setup
  validate   — check for errors
  import     — import templates
  gui        — launch editor

Template triggers:
  :simplify  — explain in simple terms
  :explain   — explain context comprehensively (pt 1)
  :critique  — review for gaps and conflicts (pt 2)
  :verify    — fresh-context verification pass
  :meta      — context-safe meta-prompt generator
  :qa        — documentation QA pass
  :save      — save project state for next session
  :defaults  — set default working style
  :listen    — convert research to listenable article

Config: ~/.config/espansr/
Sync:   espansr sync
